statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Current app implementation
links.summary: The provider writes a six-value performance-focused bundle under HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power.

links.title: Repo power notes
links.summary: The repo tracks these low-level values as research notes and reverse-engineered observations, but this review did not find a primary Microsoft registry source for publishing the bundle as validated.
